# DSA Mastery
> Master Data Structures & Algorithms with 38,000+ curated problems across 14 topics and 25+ platforms.

## Essential pages
- Home: https://learn-dsa.frontendx.dev/
- Explore Problems: https://learn-dsa.frontendx.dev/explore
- Learn Patterns: https://learn-dsa.frontendx.dev/learn
- Books: https://learn-dsa.frontendx.dev/books
- Algorithm Patterns: https://learn-dsa.frontendx.dev/pattern
- About: https://learn-dsa.frontendx.dev/about

## Topics
- Arrays & Hashing: https://learn-dsa.frontendx.dev/learn/arrays-hashing
- Two Pointers: https://learn-dsa.frontendx.dev/learn/two-pointers
- Sliding Window: https://learn-dsa.frontendx.dev/learn/sliding-window
- Stack: https://learn-dsa.frontendx.dev/learn/stack
- Binary Search: https://learn-dsa.frontendx.dev/learn/binary-search
- Linked List: https://learn-dsa.frontendx.dev/learn/linked-list
- Trees: https://learn-dsa.frontendx.dev/learn/tree
- Tries: https://learn-dsa.frontendx.dev/learn/trie
- Heap / Priority Queue: https://learn-dsa.frontendx.dev/learn/heap
- Recursion / Backtracking: https://learn-dsa.frontendx.dev/learn/backtracking
- Graphs: https://learn-dsa.frontendx.dev/learn/graph
- Dynamic Programming: https://learn-dsa.frontendx.dev/learn/dp
- Greedy: https://learn-dsa.frontendx.dev/learn/greedy
- Bit Manipulation: https://learn-dsa.frontendx.dev/learn/bit-manipulation

## Featured Books
- Cracking the Coding Interview: https://learn-dsa.frontendx.dev/books/ctci
- Competitive Programming 4: https://learn-dsa.frontendx.dev/books/cp4
- Competitive Programmer's Handbook: https://learn-dsa.frontendx.dev/books/cph
- Introduction to Algorithms (CLRS): https://learn-dsa.frontendx.dev/books/clrs
- Grokking Algorithms: https://learn-dsa.frontendx.dev/books/grokking
